leadText: Challenge Road (Japanese: チャレンジロード Challenge Road) is a part of the Isle of Armor in the Galar region. It connects to Brawlers' Cave in the south and the Training Lowlands in the west. The Tower of Darkness is located here.

sections.title: Geography
sections.text: Geography [ edit | edit source ] Challenge Road is a rocky hill area with several patches of dried-up tall grass .

sections.title: Items
sections.text: Items [ edit | edit source ] Item Location Games Metal Coat Straight ahead from Brawler's Cave 's entrance Sw Sh Muscle Band Left from the bottom of the second set of stairs Sw Sh Black Glasses Behind the Tower of Darkness Sw Sh TR95 ( Throat Chop ) Behind the Tower of Darkness Sw Sh Hidden items [ edit | edit source ] Unless otherwise stated, hidden items in the Isle of Armor regenerate every day. In many of these cases, they can also regenerate as different items. Every item that regenerates every day can also rarely regenerate as a Wishing Piece (at approximately a 1% chance).
